days.title: Arrival and Mall Road Exploration
days.description: Arrive in Manali, check in to your hotel and refresh. In the afternoon/evening, take a leisurely stroll down the vibrant Mall Road, shop for local handicrafts and woolens, and visit the historic wooden Hadimba Temple situated amidst tall deodar forests.

days.title: Solang Valley Adventure
days.description: Head out early to Solang Valley, a hub for outdoor adventure sports. Engage in thrilling activities such as paragliding, zorbing, and quad biking. In winter, Solang turns into a snow wonderland, perfect for skiing and amateur snowboarding.

days.title: Vashisht Hot Springs & Scenic Departure
days.description: Visit the quiet village of Vashisht, famous for its natural hot sulfur springs and ancient temples. Soak in the therapeutic warm waters to relax your muscles before taking a scenic drive back or heading to the bus/airport terminal for departure.

days.title: The Ridge & Mall Road Walk
days.description: Arrive in the historic summer capital of British India. Walk along The Ridge, admire the neo-gothic Christ Church, and browse the bustling shops and cafes on Mall Road.

days.title: Kufri Adventure & Yak Riding
days.description: Excursion to Kufri, situated at a higher elevation. Take a pony ride up to Mahasu Peak, experience yak riding, and visit the Himalayan Nature Park to see rare high-altitude wildlife.

days.title: Jakhoo Temple & Departure
days.description: Hike or take a ropeway up to Jakhoo Hill, the highest peak in Shimla, to see the giant Lord Hanuman statue and panoramic valley views. Depart in the afternoon.

days.title: City Palace & Lake Pichola Cruise
days.description: Visit the majestic City Palace overlooking Lake Pichola. In the late afternoon, enjoy a scenic boat cruise around Lake Pichola, capturing views of Jag Mandir and the Lake Palace at sunset.

days.title: Saheliyon-ki-Bari & Monsoon Palace Sunset
days.description: Stroll through the fountains of Saheliyon-ki-Bari gardens. In the evening, drive up to Sajjangarh Monsoon Palace on the hilltop for panoramic sunset views over the lakes.

days.title: Jagdish Temple & Departure
days.description: Explore the ornate, 17th-century Jagdish Temple. Shop for miniature paintings and traditional Rajasthani textiles in the old city bazaars before departure.

days.title: Historic Old Delhi and Street Food
days.description: Explore the colossal Red Fort, visit the peaceful Jama Masjid, and take a rickshaw ride through the narrow lanes of Chandni Chowk, sampling famous street food like paranthas and jalebis.

days.title: New Delhi Heritage Landmarks
days.description: Visit the beautiful Humayun's Tomb, drive past the majestic India Gate and Rashtrapati Bhavan, and explore the ancient towering minaret Qutub Minar.

days.title: Lotus Temple & Departure
days.description: Spend a quiet morning at the flower-shaped Lotus Temple. Browse contemporary crafts at Dilli Haat open-air food and craft bazaar before heading to the airport/station.

days.title: Ganga Aarti & Ghat Exploration
days.description: Arrive in one of the world's oldest living cities. Explore the old town alleys and witness the spiritual and spectacular evening Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat.

days.title: Subah-e-Banaras & Sarnath excursion
days.description: Take a magical sunrise boat ride on the Holy Ganges. In the afternoon, visit Sarnath, the peaceful archaeological site where Lord Buddha preached his first sermon.

days.title: Kashi Vishwanath Temple & Departure
days.description: Visit the sacred golden-domed Kashi Vishwanath Temple. Shop for exquisite Banarasi silk sarees before checking out for departure.

days.title: Iconic Eiffel Tower & Seine Cruise
days.description: Arrive in Paris. Visit the Eiffel Tower, walk along the Champ de Mars, and in the evening, enjoy a sunset cruise along the River Seine to view historical monuments.

days.title: Art & Masterpieces at the Louvre
days.description: Spend the day exploring the world-famous Louvre Museum to see the Mona Lisa and Venus de Milo. Later, walk the Champs-Élysées to the Arc de Triomphe.

days.title: Montmartre & Sacré-Cœur Basilica
days.description: Wander through the artistic bohemian village of Montmartre, visit the Place du Tertre, and take in panoramic city views from the Sacré-Cœur Basilica.

days.title: Palace of Versailles Day Trip
days.description: Take a short train ride to explore the magnificent Palace of Versailles, touring the Hall of Mirrors and walking through the sprawling royal gardens.

days.title: Notre-Dame & departure
days.description: Visit the Île de la Cité to see Notre-Dame Cathedral and the stained glass of Sainte-Chapelle before checking out for departure.

days.title: Futuristic Shibuya & Meiji Shrine
days.description: Experience the famous Shibuya Crossing, see the Hachiko Statue, and walk through Yoyogi Park to the serene wooden Meiji Shrine.

days.title: Historic Asakusa & Akihabara Electronics
days.description: Visit Senso-ji, Tokyo's oldest Buddhist temple in Asakusa. In the afternoon, dive into the neon lights, gaming centers, and anime shops of Akihabara.

days.title: TeamLab Planets & Ginza Shopping
days.description: Experience the immersive digital art museum TeamLab Planets. Spend the afternoon browsing luxury shops and cafes in the upscale Ginza district.

days.title: Mount Fuji Excursion
days.description: Take a bullet train or guided tour to the Hakone/Lake Kawaguchiko region for scenic views of Mount Fuji and a relaxing cruise.

days.title: Shinjuku Gyoen & Departure
days.description: Walk through the beautiful landscapes of Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden before taking the express train to Narita/Haneda airport.

days.title: Sacred Monkey Forest & Ubud Palace
days.description: Arrive in Bali's cultural heart. Stroll through the lush Sacred Monkey Forest Sanctuary and visit the traditional Ubud Royal Palace.

days.title: Tegallalang Rice Terraces & Coffee Plantation
days.description: Hike the iconic green Tegallalang Rice Terraces, try the jungle swings, and visit a local plantation to taste famous Balinese coffees and teas.

days.title: Tirta Empul Holy Water Temple & Spa
days.description: Experience a spiritual purification ritual at Tirta Empul Temple. Indulge in a traditional Balinese massage and flower bath at an Ubud spa.

days.title: Mount Batur Sunrise Trek
days.description: Wake up early for an active sunrise hike to the summit of Mount Batur active volcano for breathtaking views and breakfast cooked by steam vents.

days.title: Campuhan Ridge Walk & Departure
days.description: Take a peaceful morning walk along the scenic Campuhan Ridge between hills and rivers before packing up for your return flight.
